corporate.note: 12.5% trading rate is a cornerstone of Irish industrial policy; 15% Pillar Two applies to MNE groups with annual consolidated revenue >= EUR 750M per OECD GloBE rules transposed via Finance (No.2) Act 2023

consumption_tax.note: VAT standard 23%; 13.5% reduced (construction, fuel, vet services); 9% tourism & hospitality; 0% food, oral medicines, children's clothing

personal_income_tax.note: Standard rate band EUR 42,000 (single 2025); USC and PRSI apply separately

prsi.note: Pay Related Social Insurance; employer 11.15% from 1 Oct 2024

cid_note: CID-addressable; ruleset hash covers trading_cit_rate + vat_standard_rate + pillar_two_rate
